info.title: StablePay API
info.description: Cross-border stablecoin remittance API on Solana. Enables instant, low-cost USD to INR remittances via USDC with MPC wallet abstraction and guaranteed delivery.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Social login, token refresh, and logout

tags.name: Funding
tags.description: Stripe-backed wallet funding and status queries

post.description: Verifies the Stripe-Signature header, then dispatches payment_intent.succeeded and payment_intent.payment_failed events to the appropriate funding handler. Always returns 200 once the signature is valid, to prevent Stripe retries on downstream errors.
Creates an MPC-backed Solana wallet for the given user

409.description: Wallet already exists for this user

post.description: Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent and a funding order. Returns the funding order reference plus a one-time Stripe client secret.

409.description: Funding already in progress for this wallet

get.description: Returns a paginated list of remittances for the authenticated user

post.description: Initiates a new USD to INR remittance with locked FX rate

Refunds a FUNDED order via Stripe. Rejects if the sender's on-chain USDC balance or wallet available balance is less than the funding amount. No on-chain USDC is returned — the sender's test tokens stay in their ATA.

409.description: Refund not allowed or balance insufficient

get.description: Retrieves remittance claim details by the claim token sent via SMS

post.description: Submits a claim with the recipient's UPI ID to receive the INR payout
Exchanges a Google ID token for app access and refresh tokens

201.description: New user created and logged in

post.description: Rotates the refresh token and issues a new access token
Revokes all refresh tokens for the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieves a remittance by its unique identifier
Returns the current exchange rate for the given currency pair (e.g. USD-INR)
Returns the current status of a funding order. The Stripe client secret is never returned here.
